task_completion.description: Select 'Penta 1 doses given' and 'Penta 3 doses given' as data elements
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DHIS2 Data Visualizer, the Data dimension panel or layout shows 'Penta 1 doses given' and 'Penta 3 doses given' selected.
The Period dimension panel or layout shows '2023' selected.

task_completion.description: Set the Organisation Units to all Districts in Sierra Leone
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Organisation Units dimension panel shows the 'District' level selected, or all individual districts within Sierra Leone checked.

task_completion.description: Create a scatter plot with Penta 1 on the Y-axis and Penta 3 on the X-axis
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main visualization area displays a Scatter Plot (dots on a Cartesian plane). The layout or axis labels show 'Penta 1 doses given' assigned to the Vertical (Y) axis and 'Penta 3 doses given' assigned to the Horizontal (X) axis.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization as 'Penta Dropout Scatter 2023'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top header or title of the visualization displays the saved name 'Penta Dropout Scatter 2023'.

task_completion.description: Set public access sharing setting to 'Can view'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sharing settings dialog is open, and the 'Public access' dropdown or toggle is set to 'Can view' (or 'View only').

task_completion.description: Export the data as a CSV file to /home/ga/Downloads/
task_completion.visual_evidence: A download menu showing 'CSV' being selected, a browser download notification for a CSV file, or a file manager window showing a CSV file in the /home/ga/Downloads/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web GUI to create the visualization
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 Data Visualizer interface in a web browser, rather than terminal API commands (like curl) or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The scatter plot renders actual data points
integrity.visual_evidence: The scatter plot displays multiple distinct dots representing the districts, indicating real data was loaded, rather than an empty chart or a manually drawn image.

integrity.description: CSV export was generated by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The export was triggered via the DHIS2 download menu (e.g., Download -> Data -> CSV), rather than the agent manually typing data into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target visualization type is SCATTER. The target period is exactly 2023. The target organisation unit level is District. The required data elements must include keywords 'penta', '1', and '3' (specifically 'Penta 1 doses given' and 'Penta 3 doses given'). The expected export format is a CSV file.
